name: Control Lab — Slow, Confusion, Spirit Guardians, Spike Growth, Chain Lightning (D-CTRL-1)
description: Bench for the five control-spell signatures. Cassia the Confounder (your only hero — drive her) carries all five. CHAIN LIGHTNING: blast the Ogre in the clustered pack on the right; three bolts arc to the goblins around it (each rolls its own save). SLOW: catch a knot of enemies in the cube — a slowed creature can't take reactions and gets an action OR a bonus action, not both (watch its turn). CONFUSION: drop it on the pack; at the start of each victim's turn it rolls a d10 — wander / freeze / lash out at a neighbour (friend or foe!) / act normally — and re-saves at end of turn. SPIRIT GUARDIANS: cast it (centred on Cassia, follows her) then let an enemy try to close — the aura is difficult terrain for them, so they crawl in at half speed AND take the radiant save damage; your side is unaffected. SPIKE GROWTH: drop it on the open lane the enemies must cross, then watch them take 2d4 per 5 ft they travel through it (no save) on top of the difficult terrain — and you can do the same by walking an ally through. The lone Bruiser starts next to Cassia so a Confusion 'lash out' has an easy neighbour to hit.
